name: GT-hyp
source: HYPOTHESIS BLOCK of lem-idempotence-inheritance (the lemma's own GIVENS, not a refs claim — legitimately quote-less). GIVEN: (H1) j is a unital order-isometric Jordan embedding of B(H)_sa into B(K)_sa. The GENUINE hypothesis is ELEMENT-isometry: ||j(x)||=||x|| for every element x in B(H)_sa (an order-isometric Jordan embedding preserves the norm of elements). The OPERATOR-norm identity ||jM||_op=||M||_op for a linear operator M into B(H)_sa is then a ONE-LINE CONSEQUENCE (NOT a raw hypothesis): ||jM||_op = sup_{||z||<=1}||j(Mz)|| = sup_{||z||<=1}||Mz|| = ||M||_op, where the middle equality applies element-isometry to the element Mz in B(H)_sa. In particular ||j||_op = ||j(.)||/sup = 1 (take M=identity: ||j(x)||=||x||). This derived operator-norm identity ||jM||=||M|| (left-composition with the element-isometric embedding j preserves the operator norm) is what is used operationally in node 1.3.1. (H2) j is unital, j(1)=1; (H3) C is a unital positive map (def-positive-unital-map), so ||C||<=1 and C(1)=1; (H4) Phi=Cj and F=jC are the two composites; (H5) eta>=0 is the idempotency-defect bound. These are the contract's antecedents, declared GIVEN.
